data.title: 国际服红冬推特贴集赞小活动 #4
data.summary: The third flyer from the Anonymous Red Winter Partygoers has arrived! It says: Behold! The students,
data.body:
The third flyer from the Anonymous Red Winter Partygoers has arrived! 
It says: Behold! The students, ever in pursuit of fresh stimulation!

If you spread the Red Winter Partygoers' flyers as they're revealed one by one, special content and rewards will be unlocked!

➡️Event Details : https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3418919

💌Illust: Donmini(
@donmin_h
)
